description: An account manager and technical lead conduct the initial discovery and kickoff meeting with a new managed services client.

nodes.task_description: Review the signed SOW to understand the agreed-upon services.

expected_outcome.value: The team is fully aware of the contract scope.

nodes.task_description: Conduct the kickoff meeting, introducing the team and walking through the onboarding process and timeline.

expected_outcome.value: The client understands the process and expectations are set.

nodes.task_description: Gather critical information from the client, such as existing administrator credentials, network diagrams, and a list of key vendors.

expected_outcome.value: The team collects the necessary information to begin the technical onboarding.
